personality_one_liner: A playful, vibrant, and highly tactile experience that turns AI baby generation into a delightful, gesture-driven social moment.

spacing.rule: Generous padding, large thumb zones. Avoid dense clusters. Elements should feel like physical, touchable objects floating on the white canvas.

dont's: Avoid glassmorphism to keep the white background crisp and colors popping. Solid surfaces fit the Playful/Tactile aesthetic better here.

screens.name: Splash
screens.layout: Completely white background. Large centered app logo in Violet (#987ad6) or playful 3D baby icon.

screens.name: Login

states.loading: Spinner in the button being pressed.

screens.layout: Text logo centered at the top. Two large tactile pill-shaped buttons centered vertically: 'Continue with Google' and 'Continue with Apple'. White background (#ffffff) exclusively.

screens.name: OnboardingFlow
screens.purpose: Collect name, age, and referral source.

states.loading: Lightweight loading indicator pinned at the bottom.
states.error: Validation errors below inputs in red.

screens.layout: Step-by-step screens. Screen 1: Name input. Screen 2: Age input. Screen 3: 'How did you hear about us?' using a list of selectable pill chips (TikTok, Instagram, X, Friend, Other). 'Other' expands a text field. Large titles. 'Continue' button pinned to bottom.

screens.name: SetupConfirmation
screens.layout: Centered large green checkmark (animated if possible) with text 'Everything is set up!'. Large 'Continue' button pinned to the bottom.

screens.name: MainTabs
screens.purpose: Root navigation for the primary app experience.
screens.layout: Bottom Tab Bar with 2 items. Left: 'BabyFace AI' (custom baby head icon). Right: 'Profile' (standard profile icon). Tapping the 'BabyFace AI' tab when already on it alternates its icon/theme color between blue (#3b82f6) and pink (#f472b6).

screens.name: BabyFaceAIGenerator
screens.purpose: Step-by-step data collection for the AI generation.

states.loading: Generating state: Fade transition to a dedicated loading screen with a playful spinner.

screens.layout: Top right: Credits counter badge. Center: 'Start' button. When started, flow presents sequentially: Man Age+Height -> Man Photo Upload -> Woman Age+Height -> Woman Photo Upload. Use large touch targets, clear typography, and bottom-pinned Next buttons.

screens.name: RevealScreen
screens.purpose: Transition screen after generation before showing results.
screens.layout: Large green checkmark centered. Big primary button 'Reveal Results' pinned at the bottom.

screens.name: ResultCards
screens.purpose: Tinder-style swipeable interaction showing the parents and generated baby.
screens.layout: 3D stacked cards layout. 3 total cards to swipe right on. Card 1: Man (Photo, Age, Height). Card 2: Woman (Photo, Age, Height). Card 3: Generated Baby (Features a 'surprise' animation when revealed, plus 'Potential Adult Height' stat). Bottom contains 'Share' (icon) and 'Close' buttons.

screens.name: Profile
screens.purpose: Manage user profile and view past generations.

states.loading: Skeleton grid for loading past images.
states.empty: Empty state illustration with text 'No generations yet!'.

screens.layout: Top section: Profile picture centered with a small edit pencil badge. 'Edit' button below it. Bottom section: Instagram-style 3-column masonry/square grid of past generated babies. Tapping a grid item opens a read-only modal with the 3 swipeable cards.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the '#ffffff' pure white background globally. DO NOT use off-white or gray background colors for the root layout to maintain the required aesthetic.
Buttons and active UI elements should use the Violet brand color (#987ad6) unless it is representing a gender-specific action, in which case use Blue (#3b82f6) or Pink (#f472b6).
Implement the Bottom Tab 'BabyFace AI' icon gesture carefully: tapping the active tab should toggle the active tint color between Blue and Pink in the state.

Build the ResultCards screen using react-native-reanimated and react-native-gesture-handler to create a true Tinder-style swipeable card stack. Ensure cards are stacked with 3D depth and animate smoothly off-screen when swiped right.
Add a Lottie or Reanimated 'surprise' animation (e.g., scale bounce, confetti) that triggers exactly when the 3rd card (the Baby) becomes the top card in the stack.
For the Profile screen grid, ensure images are cropped square in a 3-column layout mimicking Instagram. Tapping them should reuse the ResultCards component in a read-only mode.
Avoid glassmorphism. The playful/tactile design personality relies on solid, bold, touchable shapes against the pure white canvas with soft shadows (Tier 2).
